user_task_description: This workbook contains a candidate table where the body rows use inconsistent fonts, emphasis, and fills.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: On the `Hiring Tracker` sheet, make rows `4:10` use one consistent body style that matches row `4`, while leaving the title row, header row, and note in row `13` unchanged.
atomic_scope: Only formatting consistency is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with normalized body-row styling.

inspired_by.title: Cells in table won't update format

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- Several rows look intentionally emphasized even though they are inconsistent noise
- The instruction references a style exemplar rather than listing every formatting attribute
- Non-target rows should remain untouched
